subcodes.first_line: By the Sun of the horizon of revelation! This Day hath neither peer nor equal, and this is a Day wherein from every soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قسم بافتاب افق وحی که امروز شبهی نداشته و ندارد و امروز روزیست که از هر نفسی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @firmness in the Covenant
